details.productUrlName: Riddles in the Dark Extended Art

customAttributes.description: Look at the top four cards of your library and separate them into a face-down pile and a face-up pile. An opponent chooses one of the piles. Put that pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 8/14/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText:
"What have I got in my pocket?"
—Bilbo
